entry.value:
{"viewModel":"siderbar","fullModeNewWindow":false,"skillIndex":{"skills":{"find-skills":{"name":"find-skills","description":"Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/fengmi/.codeflicker/internal/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/fengmi/.codeflicker/internal/skills/find-skills","directoryTree":"find-skills/
├── .version-1.0.0
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.773728903664E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7736648455940708E12},"help":{"name":"help","description":"This skill should be used when the user asks about CodeFlicker, CF, or kwaipilot features, usage, troubleshooting, or help. Triggers on keywords like "CodeFlicker", "CF", "kwaipilot", "帮助", "Help", "Help Hub", or when users ask how to use features, solve problems, or need product guidance. Provides access to the official CodeFlicker help documentation for answering user questions. Do NOT use for general programming questions unrelated to CodeFlicker product.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/fengmi/.codeflicker/internal/skills/help/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/fengmi/.codeflicker/internal/skills/help","directoryTree":"help/
├── scripts/
│ ├── update-docs.ps1
│ └── update-docs.sh
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.773728903665E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7737288736360945E12},"settings":{"name":"settings","description":"This skill should be used when the user asks to "view CodeFlicker settings", "get CodeFlicker configuration", "modify CodeFlicker config", "update CodeFlicker setting", "search CodeFlicker settings", "查看 CodeFlicker 配置", "获取 CodeFlicker 设置", "修改 CodeFlicker 配置", "更新 CodeFlicker 设置", "搜索 CodeFlicker 配置", or discusses CodeFlicker/KwaiPilot extension configuration management, settings lookup, or configuration modification. Provides comprehensive guidance for managing CodeFlicker extension settings, including query, search, and update operations via Debug Server API.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/fengmi/.codeflicker/internal/skills/settings/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/fengmi/.codeflicker/internal/skills/settings","directoryTree":"settings/
├── references/
│ └── common-configs.md
├── scripts/
│ ├── check-server.sh
│ ├── search-config.sh
│ └── update-config.sh
├── .version-1.3.0
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.773728903666E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7736648456036978E12},"skill-manager":{"name":"skill-manager","description":"This skill should be used when the user asks to "create a skill", "update a skill", "delete a skill", "manage skills", "initialize skill git", "commit skill changes", "abstract a skill from conversation", "view local skills", "list available skills", "clone skill from git", "import skill from github", "import skill from gitlab", or discusses CodeFlicker skill management, skill creation workflows, skill maintenance, skill organization, or importing skills from remote git repositories. Provides comprehensive guidance for creating, updating, deleting, git-managing, cloning from remote repositories, and organizing CodeFlicker skills throughout their entire lifecycle.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/fengmi/.codeflicker/internal/skills/skill-manager/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/fengmi/.codeflicker/internal/skills/skill-manager","directoryTree":"skill-manager/
├── examples/
│ ├── complete-skill-template.md
│ └── simple-skill-template.md
├── references/
│ ├── git-operations.md
│ ├── skill-directories.md
│ └── skill-types.md
├── scripts/
│ ├── commit-skill.sh
│ ├── init-git.sh
│ └── validate-skill.sh
├── .version-1.0.9
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.773728903667E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7736648456285972E12}},"invalidSkills":[],"lastUpdatedAt":1.773728903668E12},"codeSearchSelectOpenFileHistory":["GraduationJava/src/main/java/com/smartforum/SmartForumApplication.java","GraduationJava/pom.xml","webview://89608b3e-6eaf-4e16-850c-1e1ef7101e66"],"codeSearchSelectOpenDirHistory":["GraduationJava/src/main/java/com/smartforum","GraduationJava","webview:/"],"indexState":{"indexed":true,"indexing":false,"indexingProgress":1.0,"indexingMessage":"索引中: 索引任务执行完毕 ","lastBuildTime":"3-17-2026, 2:27:58 PM","pauseIndexManual":false,"status":"indexed"},"activeComposerSessionId":"6ssil369cl7651oeh3jv","activeSettingPage":"fileIndex","wikiState":{"indexing":true,"indexingProgress":0.1,"indexed":false,"indexingMessage":"生成项目 Wiki ···","status":"indexing"}}
